report.title: List of imports which are reversible
report.description: At time of writing, used for the reversible imports drop-down in importer 2.
report.query: SELECT #columns# FROM imports i WHERE i.created_by_id = #currentUser# AND i.reversible = true /* Website ID might be NULL if reversing from the Warehouse UI */ AND (#website_id# = -1 OR i.website_id = #website_id#) AND i.deleted = false /* Due to difficulties accurately determining when a record is an update and other situations; what we do in other reports is we look at the X most recent created_bys within the relevant import_guid to determine insertions. To do this accurately, we need to make sure the imported data import_guids haven't been removed by further import updates. Only allow reversals where the number of insertions + updated matches the number of import_guids in the database (can ignore deleted flag for this check). */ AND i.inserted + i.updated in (select count(o.id) FROM occurrences o WHERE o.import_guid = i.import_guid )
